title: stackhousia spathulata
intro: Stackhousia spathulata is a flowering plant native to Australia, commonly known as the Queensland starflower or the star flower. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, Stackhousia spathulata is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
